response.justification: Candidate is a versatile full-stack engineer with strong web/backend experience, but the role demands 8+ years of C++ and deep large-scale cloud compute platform expertise, which the resume does not demonstrate. C++ exposure is limited to a short stint at National Instruments roughly a decade ago, and there is no evidence of building distributed cloud compute infrastructure or holding a formal technical leadership role over cloud/DevOps engineers.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Experience with low-latency microservices handling millions of requests/second at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby
Strong mentoring and community track record via workshops, talks, and courses
concerns: Far short of the 8 years of C++ required; primary languages are TypeScript/Node and DLang
No demonstrated experience leading or architecting an internal cloud compute platform
No formal tech-lead role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers in production cloud architecture

key_factors.factor: Lack of large-scale cloud compute platform/distributed infra ownership
Distributed systems exposure at Sociomantic (low-latency, high-throughput)
